name: Raspberry and Fig Gratin
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Cream, sour, thinned with milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the raspberries in a gratin dish.
2. Pour the sour cream over the raspberries.
3. Arrange the figs on top of the sour cream.
4. Sprinkle the brown sugar evenly over the figs.
5. Heat under a broiler until the sugar browns and caramelizes.
6. Turn off the heat and serve warm.
